settings.headline: A more serious approach to anti-aging care.
settings.subhead: Skinfluence is built for women who want stronger anti-aging support, clearer guidance, and a more elevated experience than standard skincare shopping.

settings.headline: Brand mission
settings.body: Skinfluence exists to create a premium, clinically guided anti-aging path for women who have outgrown ordinary skincare and want something more focused, more consistent, and easier to trust.

settings.headline: Why Skinfluence exists
settings.body: Many women spend heavily on skincare and still feel like their routine has plateaued. Skinfluence is designed for that moment when the next step should feel more advanced, more guided, and less fragmented.

settings.headline: Provider review philosophy
settings.body: Skinfluence is built around provider review, realistic expectations, and a monthly treatment model designed for consistency. The goal is visible improvement over time through a more considered anti-aging experience.

settings.headline: A more advanced anti-aging routine starts here.
settings.subhead: Start with evaluation, then move into monthly care if approved.
